topic: Demonstrative Pronouns — This / That / These / Those
instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। This/That/These/Those का सही use करें।

questions.explanation: 'This' singular near object के लिए। 'a pen' क्योंकि pen consonant से शुरू होता है।
'These' plural near objects के लिए। 'books' plural form है।
'This' near singular object। pencil consonant से शुरू।
Plural near objects के लिए 'These are'।
'This' singular near, notebook consonant से शुरू।
Plural near objects।
Near singular object।
Near plural objects।
'This is my book' = demonstrative + be verb + possessive + noun।
Plural near objects with possessive।
'This pen is new' — demonstrative adjective के रूप में noun से पहले।
'These books are old' — plural demonstrative adjective।
'mine' = possessive pronoun (मेरा)।
'very' adverb है जो adjective beautiful को modify करता है।
'teacher's' = possessive case।
'all' quantifier के साथ plural demonstrative।
Demonstrative adjective के रूप में noun से पहले।
Plural demonstrative adjective।
'the' specific known place के लिए।
Plural near objects।
Near singular demonstrative adjective।
'done' = completed, adjective।

questions.hindi: यह शब्द मुझे समझ नहीं आया।
questions.english: This word is not clear to me.
questions.explanation: Near demonstrative with negative।
'blank' = empty, adjective।
'yours' = possessive pronoun (तुम्हारा)।

questions.hindi: ये सभी books library से हैं।
questions.english: These books are all from the library.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + all + from + place
questions.explanation: 'from the library' = source expression।
Near singular demonstrative।

questions.english: These badges are for the students.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + for + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'for the students' = purpose/recipient।
Near demonstrative adjective।

questions.hindi: ये charts wall पर लगे हैं।
questions.english: These charts are on the wall.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + on + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'on the wall' = location।

questions.hindi: ये notebooks मेरी बहन की हैं।
questions.explanation: Possessive case 's के साथ।
Near singular demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये worksheets आज जमा करनी हैं।
alternatives: These worksheets need to be submitted today.
questions.explanation: 'due today' = deadline expression।

questions.hindi: यह colour pencil set मेरा नहीं है।
questions.english: This colour pencil set is not mine.
questions.explanation: Negative with possessive pronoun।

questions.hindi: ये सभी students बहुत मेहनती हैं।
questions.english: These students are all very hardworking.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + all + very + adjective
questions.explanation: 'all' with plural near demonstrative।
Near singular demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये textbooks नई edition की हैं।
questions.english: These textbooks are the new edition.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + article + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: 'new edition' descriptive phrase।
Near demonstrative adjective।

questions.hindi: ये pens ink से भरे हुए हैं।
questions.english: These pens are filled with ink.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + filled + with + noun
questions.explanation: 'filled with' = भरे हुए।
Near singular demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये graphs बहुत clearly बने हैं।
questions.english: These graphs are very clearly drawn.
questions.explanation: 'clearly drawn' = clearly + past participle।
Near singular demonstrative।
Plural near demonstrative।

alternatives: This dictionary is needed by me.
questions.explanation: 'need' के साथ demonstrative object position में।
Near plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: यह question paper बहुत लंबा था।
questions.english: This question paper was very long.
questions.explanation: Past tense के साथ demonstrative। 'was' = past of 'is'।
Negative plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: यह pen काम नहीं कर रहा।
questions.hint: This + noun + is + not + present participle
questions.explanation: Present continuous negative।

questions.hindi: ये all notes मुझे copy करने हैं।
questions.english: I need to copy all these notes.
alternatives: These notes all need to be copied.
questions.hint: I + need to + copy + all + these + noun
questions.explanation: Demonstrative as object with 'all'।

questions.hindi: यह board marker ख़त्म हो गया।
questions.english: This board marker has run out.
questions.explanation: Present perfect के साथ demonstrative।
'That' singular far object के लिए।
'Those' plural far objects के लिए।
Far singular demonstrative with possessive।
Far plural demonstrative।
Far demonstrative adjective।
Far plural demonstrative adjective।
Far demonstrative adjective।
Far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह घड़ी मेरी दादी की है।
questions.explanation: 'grandmother's' = possessive case।
Far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह washing machine ख़राब हो गई।
questions.english: That washing machine has broken down.
questions.explanation: Present perfect के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वे पौधे बहुत बड़े हो गए हैं।
questions.english: Those plants have grown very big.
questions.explanation: Present perfect के साथ far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह bed room का मेरा है।
questions.explanation: Far demonstrative with possessive pronoun।
Far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह lamp काम नहीं कर रहा।
questions.explanation: Negative far demonstrative।
Far plural demonstrative with passive adjective।
Far demonstrative adjective।

questions.english: Those boxes are in the garage.
questions.hint: Those + noun + are + in + article + noun
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative with location।
Far demonstrative adjective।

questions.english: Those pots are on the balcony.
questions.hint: Those + noun + are + on + article + noun
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative with location।

questions.hindi: वह दीवार पर तस्वीर बहुत सुंदर है।
questions.english: That picture on the wall is very beautiful.
questions.hint: That + noun + on + article + noun + is + adjective
questions.explanation: Prepositional phrase के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वे पुराने जूते यहाँ क्यों हैं?
questions.english: Why are those old shoes here?
questions.hint: Why + are + those + adjective + noun + here
questions.explanation: Wh-question के साथ far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह घड़ी बंद हो गई है।
questions.explanation: Present perfect के साथ far demonstrative।
Far plural demonstrative।
Past tense के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.english: Those curtains need to be changed.
questions.hint: Those + noun + need + to + be + past participle
questions.explanation: Passive need के साथ far plural demonstrative।
Far demonstrative with passive construction।

questions.english: Those utensils are in the kitchen.
questions.hint: Those + noun + are + in + article + noun
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative with location।
Far demonstrative adjective।

questions.hindi: वे tiles बहुत फिसलन वाली हैं।
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह fan तेज़ आवाज़ करता है।
questions.english: That fan makes a lot of noise.
questions.explanation: Far demonstrative as subject।
Imperative sentence के साथ far plural demonstrative।
Far demonstrative adjective।

questions.english: Those trophies are on the shelf.
questions.hint: Those + noun + are + on + article + noun
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative with location।
Far demonstrative adjective।

questions.hindi: वे old newspapers recycle करने हैं।
questions.english: Those old newspapers need to be recycled.
questions.hint: Those + adjective + noun + need + to + be + verb
questions.explanation: Far plural demonstrative with passive need।

questions.english: There are clothes in that cupboard.
alternatives: That cupboard has clothes in it.
questions.hint: There + are + noun + in + that + noun
questions.explanation: 'There are' के साथ far demonstrative।
Negative far plural demonstrative।
Far demonstrative with passive adjective।
Far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह दरवाज़ा हमेशा खुला रहता है।
questions.explanation: 'always' frequency adverb with far demonstrative।
Present perfect के साथ far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह AC ठीक से काम नहीं कर रहा।
questions.english: That AC is not working properly.
questions.hint: That + noun + is + not + working + adverb
questions.explanation: Negative present continuous के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वे सारे बर्तन साफ़ करने हैं।
questions.english: All those utensils need to be washed.
questions.hint: All + those + noun + need + to + be + verb
questions.explanation: 'All those' = far plural with quantifier।
questions.grammarRule: All those + [noun] + need to be + [past participle]

questions.hindi: वह लकड़ी की table बहुत भारी है।
questions.english: That wooden table is very heavy.
questions.hint: That + adjective + noun + is + very + adjective
questions.explanation: Far demonstrative with compound noun modifier।

questions.hindi: वे पुराने लैंप यहाँ क्यों रखे हैं?
questions.english: Why are those old lamps kept here?
questions.hint: Why + are + those + adjective + noun + kept + here
questions.explanation: Wh-question with far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह sofa set बहुत पुराना लग रहा है।
questions.english: That sofa set looks very old.
questions.explanation: 'looks' linking verb के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वे books shelf पर बड़े करीने से रखी हैं।
questions.english: Those books are neatly arranged on the shelf.
questions.hint: Those + noun + are + adverb + past participle + on + article + noun
questions.explanation: Passive adjective with adverb, far plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह घड़ी दीवार पर बहुत अच्छी लग रही है।
questions.english: That clock looks very good on the wall.
questions.hint: That + noun + looks + very + adjective + on + article + noun
questions.explanation: 'looks' linking verb के साथ far demonstrative।
Far plural demonstrative।
Near demonstrative in office context।
'need' के साथ near plural demonstrative।
Past passive के साथ far demonstrative।
Far plural demonstrative in office context।
Near demonstrative in office context।

questions.hint: These + noun + need + to + be + sent + adverb
questions.explanation: Passive need के साथ near plural demonstrative।

questions.english: That project was completed on time.

questions.explanation: Past passive के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये सभी employees बहुत hardworking हैं।
questions.english: These employees are all very hardworking.
questions.hint: These + noun + are + all + very + adjective
questions.explanation: Near plural demonstrative with 'all'।
Far demonstrative in office context।
Near demonstrative in office context।

questions.english: These forms need to be filled.

questions.explanation: Passive construction के साथ near plural demonstrative।

questions.english: That conference room has been booked.

questions.explanation: Present perfect passive के साथ far demonstrative।
Near demonstrative in office context।

questions.hindi: वे पुराने records delete कर दो।
questions.explanation: Imperative के साथ far plural demonstrative।
Near demonstrative in office context।

questions.hindi: ये invoices approve हो गई हैं।
questions.hint: These + noun + have + been + past participle
questions.explanation: Present perfect passive के साथ near plural demonstrative।

questions.hindi: वह budget इस महीने exceed हो गया।
questions.english: That budget was exceeded this month.
questions.explanation: Past passive के साथ far demonstrative।
Past tense के साथ near demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये सारे tasks आज complete करने हैं।
questions.english: All these tasks need to be completed today.
questions.hint: All + these + noun + need + to + be + completed + today
questions.explanation: 'All these' = near plural with quantifier।
questions.grammarRule: All these + [noun] + need to be + [past participle] + [time]

questions.hindi: वह office बहुत व्यस्त लग रहा है।
questions.explanation: 'looks' linking verb के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.hindi: यह salary slip confirm हो गई।
questions.english: This salary slip has been confirmed.
questions.hint: This + noun + has + been + past participle
questions.explanation: Present perfect passive के साथ near demonstrative।

questions.hindi: ये कागज़ात अभी तक sign नहीं हुए।
questions.english: These papers have not been signed yet.
questions.hint: These + noun + have + not + been + signed + yet
questions.explanation: Present perfect negative passive।
questions.grammarRule: These + [noun] + have not been + [past participle] + yet

questions.explanation: Far demonstrative with location।

questions.hindi: यह कंपनी बहुत grow कर रही है।

questions.hint: Those + noun + are + number + years + old

questions.english: This decision is from the management.

questions.explanation: Near demonstrative with source।
'All these' near plural demonstrative।
Past tense के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.english: This policy applies to all employees.
questions.hint: This + noun + applies + to + all + noun
questions.explanation: Near demonstrative as subject with third-person singular verb।

questions.hindi: वे पुराने systems अब काम नहीं करते।
questions.english: Those old systems no longer work.
alternatives: Those old systems don't work anymore.

Past के साथ near demonstrative।

Past tense के साथ far demonstrative।

questions.explanation: Present perfect के साथ near demonstrative।

questions.english: All those projects are still pending.

questions.explanation: 'still' के साथ far plural demonstrative।
Near demonstrative in office context।

questions.english: These new rules apply to everyone.
questions.hint: These + adjective + noun + apply + to + everyone
questions.explanation: Near plural demonstrative as subject।
Far demonstrative in office context।
Near demonstrative in office context।

Near plural demonstrative।

questions.english: This salary hike is well deserved.

questions.english: That quarterly review was very good.

alternatives: Can you show me that bag?

alternatives: What is the price of this?

alternatives: What is the price of those gloves?

Near demonstrative के साथ negative।
Far demonstrative के साथ availability question।
Near plural demonstrative के साथ comparison।

questions.english: Is that available in my size?

questions.hint: Is + that + available + in + my + noun
questions.explanation: Far demonstrative के साथ size question।

questions.hindi: मुझे वह वाला नीला kurta दिखाएं।
questions.english: Please show me that blue kurta.
alternatives: Can I see that blue kurta?

questions.hindi: यह shoes की quality अच्छी है।

Near plural demonstrative के साथ yes/no question।
Future tense के साथ near demonstrative।

questions.hindi: मुझे वह गहरे रंग का चाहिए।

questions.explanation: Far demonstrative के साथ colour preference।

questions.hindi: मुझे ये nahi, वो वाले चाहिए।
